---
title: "Contributing Guidelines and Codes of Conduct for Open Projects" 
description: | 
  This talk was given in the week 4 session of the 6th cohort of the Open Seeds program by OLS, held online.
date: "2022-10-03"
image: OLS_logo.png
categories:
- Oral presentation 
- Open Science
- Education
---
[{{< fa calendar-check >}} Event](https://openlifesci.org/ols-6){.btn target=_blank} [{{< fa play-circle >}} Oral presentation (English)](https://youtu.be/M0szFcbGdBU?t=2576){.btn target=_blank} [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill>}} Slides (English)](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.7536817){.btn target=_blank}
